results.report_claim: high->medium downgrade. RCE not reproducible via FORBIDDEN_BUILTINS.
results.empirical: NEW VECTOR CONFIRMED: def generate_signal(self, bar, features, imp_func=__import__): imp_func(os).system(PWNED). Stage1 check_syntax PASSED (passed=True, no errors). Stage3 run_sandbox PASSED + SANDBOX_ESCAPED.txt created on disk with content ATLAS_STAGE3_RCE_CONFIRMED. Root cause: FORBIDDEN_BUILTINS only checks ast.Call nodes. __import__ as ast.Name in default argument is not a Call node and bypasses check. SANDBOX_BUILTINS[__import__] = real __import__ provides callable. DA tested (a)-(e) correctly but missed non-Call Name vector.
results.rationale: RCE is reproducible via __import__ default arg exploit. CSR-101 severity must be critical not medium.

results.report_claim: medium, validated true. 2-segment chain_parts gap confirmed.
results.empirical: import math as a; a.os() -> PASSED (chain_parts[1:-1]=[]). numpy/pandas have no direct .os public attr. No exploitable path in ALLOWED_MODULES found.
results.rationale: Gap confirmed but no practical exploit. Fix recommended.

results.report_claim: medium, validated true. sandbox_runner _load_strategy_class missing __module__ filter.
results.empirical: sandbox_runner.py:765-772 confirmed: no __module__ check, no multi-class error. runner.py:259-281 confirmed: has both. ALLOWED_ATLAS_SUBMODULES limits real risk.
results.rationale: Confirmed. Port runner.py fix to sandbox_runner.py.

results.report_claim: medium, validated true. L921/L1101/L1144 bypass notify_fill causing shadow drift.
results.empirical: L921: strategy.on_fill({FLAT}) direct + close_position_by_id separate, no notify_fill. L1101: same. L1144: same. L1062 entry: state.notify_fill correct. L1258 end_of_data: notify_fill_shadow_only correct. L1330 comment says migrated but 3 paths are not. Parity PASS explained: shadow is Live/Paper only, not BT computation.
results.rationale: Confirmed. Shadow drift in Live confirmed. Medium appropriate.

results.report_claim: Not in original report - newly discovered
results.title: FORBIDDEN_BUILTINS Name node blind spot
results.empirical: All FORBIDDEN_BUILTINS (exec/eval/open/getattr/setattr/delattr/hasattr/globals/locals/vars/compile/__import__) bypass Stage1 when used as ast.Name non-Call nodes. Confirmed bypasses: (1) def f(x=__import__) default arg -> Stage1 PASS + Stage3 RCE, (2) _imp = __import__ class var -> Stage1 PASS + Stage3 RCE mechanism confirmed, (3) lambda m=__import__ -> Stage1 PASS. eval/exec stored as default arg also bypass Stage1 but blocked at Stage3 (not in SANDBOX_BUILTINS).
results.rationale: Fix: add ast.Name walk checking FORBIDDEN_BUILTINS names in non-Call contexts.

csr_101_final_conclusion.attack_vector: imp_func=__import__ default arg in generate_signal method. Stage3 run_sandbox executed echo command and wrote file to disk.
csr_101_final_conclusion.da_partial_correctness: DA correctly blocked (a)-(e). Failed to test non-Call Name contexts for __import__.
immediate_fixes: atlas/validator/syntax_checker.py: Add ast.Name node detection for FORBIDDEN_BUILTINS outside Call func context
